value.found_quote: Secure sandbox execution: Empowering agents to safely solve complex computational problems and automate workflows through dynamic Code Execution and Computer Use, allowing them to run scripts or mimic human-like interactions with graphical interfaces.
value.rationale: The page explicitly describes a "Code Execution" offering under its "Sandbox" section, with dedicated Overview and Quickstart pages listed. The description matches the claim: it is a sandboxed, provider-hosted environment that lets agents safely run scripts to solve computational problems and automate workflows. The page also carries a top-level "Preview" notice indicating the feature is in pre-GA (preview) status.
